runners.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.5 lengths at Sandown over 515m (29.40) beating Lektra Beta in Mix 3/4 on April 9. Looks the one to beat again.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 520m in 29.89. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 520m at this track at Free For All level. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 2, scoring three times. Among the chances.
